description.value:
A compact one-handed crossbow that fires with surprising force at close range. Its clockwork reload mechanism and hipshot capability make it a favorite for mobile skirmishers and ambushers.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Light, Ranged d4 (30/120), Piercing
BasicOne-Handed, Light, Ranged d6+2 (30/120), Reload free, Hipshot, Keen, Steady
MasterOne-Handed, Light, Ranged d6+2 (30/120), Reload free, Hipshot, Keen, Steady â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkYou can reload this crossbow one-handed. If you have not used your Attack action this turn, you may make one attack with this weapon as a bonus action.

rmeData.masterPerk: You can reload this crossbow one-handed. If you have not used your Attack action this turn, you may make one attack with this weapon as a bonus action.
